content.speakerText: I paid for the dinner with my corporate card. Could you include the tax ID on the receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我用公司卡支付了晚餐，能在收据上加上税号吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course, I'll add your tax ID right away.
No issue — I'll update the receipt with your tax ID and email it.
Sure thing. Please confirm the tax ID so I can enter it correctly.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整回应了添加税号的特殊要求
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词如 'add', 'update', 'enter'，语法正确
表达自然度：语气专业且主动提供解决方案
关键词覆盖：包含 tax ID, receipt, email 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在餐厅用餐后，需要索取发票用于公司报销，礼貌地向服务员提出请求
content.speakerText: Could I please get a receipt for this meal? My company is XYZ Technologies.
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我这张餐费的收据吗？我的公司是XYZ科技。
expectedAnswers: Could I get a receipt for this, please?
Would it be possible to have a receipt for my payment?
Can you issue a receipt with my company name: XYZ Technologies?
I need a receipt for reimbursement — could you include my company name, XYZ Technologies?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了索取收据和报销用途的意图
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的礼貌表达（如Could I, Would it be possible）
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在服务场景中的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了receipt, company name, reimbursement等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在酒店前台办理退房，需要一张包含公司信息的发票用于财务报销
content.speakerText: Could you please send me a receipt with my company details? It's Global Solutions Inc.
content.speakerTextCn: 能麻烦您发一张包含我公司信息的收据吗？公司是Global Solutions Inc。
expectedAnswers: Can I get a receipt emailed to me with my company name: Global Solutions Inc?
Could you print a receipt and include our company information?
I need an official receipt for accounting — please add Global Solutions Inc.
Would you mind including the company name on the receipt? It's Global Solutions Inc.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了需要包含公司信息的报销凭证
语言准确性：正确使用了正式礼貌结构和公司名称的表达方式
表达自然度：符合酒店前台服务场景中的专业沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了receipt, company name, emailed, printing, accounting等关键词
